raw_response: The Baseus 65W charger is a great value for your office desk setup due to its compact foldable design and high wattage output. It supports both USB-C and USB-A ports with PPS technology, making it versatile for various devices. While some users report minor issues like inconsistent fast-charging with certain laptops and a faint coil whine, the overall satisfaction is high given the budget-friendly price of $25.99. This charger offers good quality at an affordable rate, aligning well with your price sensitivity preferences.
